rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOVIE MAE PHILLIPS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/15/25. No earlier availability. No response to issues emailed to the attorney on 7/21/25 and posted again as a preliminary tentative ruling since 9/23/25: (1) Prob. C. Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or beneficiary has previously been confined in a prison or facility under the jurisdiction of the Department of Corrections, etc. (2) When the petition seeks a non-pro rata distribution, it must show the computation on which the proposed distribution is based. Consents of interested beneficiaries must be filed. [LRSF 14.35 I.6.a.ii.] New deadline is 12/1/25 for providing courtesy copies to the assigned examiner of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GERTHA R. CURTIS REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (250 Monticello St, San Francisco, Ca 94132)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF CRYSTAL FUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) Conservators must request that the Court authorize the Clerk's Office to issue an Amended Letters of Conservatorship. Drop-off ex-parte request will be accepted. The Letters issued on 12/18/2024 affirmed #3,h-powers solely applicable to the Conservatorship of Estate, with an incorrect attachment. The Court did not grant Conservatorship of the Estate. The petitioner must deliver a courtesy copy of the ex-parte petition and the proposed order to the filing clerk so that the request can be reviewed. See LRSF 14.11.B.1) PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FERNANDO CANALES BECERRA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. These issues should have been cleared/addressed by the petitioner's verified supplement to the petition two weeks before the next hearing date: (1) The real property has been held as joint tenants. Petition needs to provide an authority under which the court can negate joint tenancy and grant this petition. Joint tenancy would not be a part of the estate as it passes by right of survivorship. (2) Petition to set forth all known heirs of the decedent. Prob. Code sec. 13651(a)(5). (3) Notice of hearing must be given to those heirs. Prob. Code sec. 13655(a)(2). Notice of Directions for Remote Appearance and Access must be given. LRSF 14.1.C. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DERRICK YANO-NAKANO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/8/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service of the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate has been filed. (3) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (4) No proof of publication of the notice has been filed. (5) The petition caption is incomplete if the petitioner is requesting IAEA authority. (6) Item 1 of the petition is incomplete (name of newspaper). (7) Only the petitioner's waiver of bond was attached to the petition. The other heirs (Decedent's children) must also waive bond if bond is not to be ordered.) Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 11/24/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
